column2: Verify CAA Human Factors Inspector Oversight Disallowance
column3: ["Attempt to request ongoing oversight of a specific crew member's workload duty and take-over evidence as a CAA human factors inspector. ", 'Confirm that the inspector cannot proceed with their inspection after receiving the error message. ']
column4: ['An error message is displayed indicating that the requested action is not allowed. ', "The inspector's ability to continue with the inspection is blocked due to the error message. "]
